reviews.review_description:
The game is extremely fun and continues to make me check but a few months ago the same thing that happens to me al l the time happened

The computer said “disconnected from servers” and i couldnt join a lobby so I waited a day and tried again… still disconnected.

And then 3 weeks pass, then 1 month, 2… 3… until today to make this review. PLEASE FIX THIS

Hi devs, im writing this because when i try going into thr game it makes me see a monster, a dark room, and a pedestal with a blue square on it. I can’t move either. I tried uninstalling and reinstalling, but that didnt work. Devs please fix this, its one of my favorite games.

Im only rating it 5 stars so the devs might see it

i played in march 21st 2025 and it was fun but now i cant join servers today please fix the servers please so i can play thank you and have a nice day

There are a lot of things I'd like to say

I've been Support Team once and ChimpModerator twice in 2024 and 2025, and I can say that this game was good

I've been for longer, though, and was here at the point where only 3 levels existed 

However, it just got dry. The PVP got boring, and it feels like too many things are packed into one game. I haven't played it in a bit, and I plan to try it again sometime soon to make this review better.

reviews.review_title: great game but theres a lot of bugs
reviews.review_description: i love this game a lot i bought the galaxy mod menu and the game itself is fun but there are a few bugs like, when i am playing legacy mode i can’t teleport to the levels i unlocked, and when i got to the levels all over again, i still couldn’t teleport to them, even though there wasn’t a lock on each level. also, teleport gun in the mod menu is broken too a bit. (quick suggestion too, you should make it so you don’t need the portal gun in experimental only and can use it in the default queue since other people can use it too and it isn’t client sided.) also please make the maps like lab or asylum in separate game modes cause people dont even play the levels horror anymore
